name: detectors: type-test-coverage.sh exits 1 when a public-API .ts file in src/ lacks a corresponding *.test-d.ts type test (g-ts-004)
command: mkdir -p src && printf "export function add(a:number,b:number):number{return a+b;}\n" > src/math.ts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/type-test-coverage.sh" --json --paths "src/**/*.ts"
